title: Set of 2 Reactive Glaze Holly Foliage Christmas Bowls | Festive Ceramic Bowls for Snacks, Soups & Desserts | Christmas Tableware - 220ml
features: FESTIVE HOLLY DESIGN | Choose from a set of 2, or a set of 4, all featuring sculpted holly leaves with red berries and glossy glaze
HANDMADE & UNIQUE | Each bowl is crafted from glazed ceramic, offering a gleaming finish and individual handmade charm
VERSATILE FESTIVE USE | Ideal for serving nibbles, soups, or sweet treats, from custards and puddings to Christmas truffles
SEASONAL CENTREPIECE | Works beautifully as a display piece or serving dish, bringing warmth and traditional style to any festive table
PERFECT FOR GIFTING | A thoughtful choice for anyone who loves charming holiday tableware and timeless festive decor. Approx 16x6cm 220ml
